use_cases: Displaying a visually engaging 404 error page for not found routes
Adding animated glitch and shake effects to error states for brand personality
Replacing default browser 404 pages with a branded error experience
Creating memorable error handling for SaaS and web applications
Enhancing user experience during navigation failures with animated feedback
ai_summary: A visually striking 404 error page component featuring continuous glitch and shake animations created with Framer Motion and canvas-based fuzzy overlay effects. The component creates an engaging error experience with layered shake animations and distortion effects, suitable for brands wanting distinctive error pages.
